restaurants.name: Garden 1897 Restaurant
restaurants.ambience: Elegant garden terrace and indoor seating in a restored 19th‑century Ottoman‑style house; serene greenery, live music in the evening
source_files: Greece and Turkey/All Inclusive Guide - Greece and Turkey_Shital.pdf

restaurants.name: Sirvan Sofrasi
restaurants.ambience: Family‑owned with stone & wood‑oven cooking; warm, hospitable vibe
source_files: Greece and Turkey/All Inclusive Guide - Greece and Turkey_Shital.pdf

restaurants.name: Turko Baba Restaurant and Cafe
restaurants.ambience: Cozy, family‑run café with just one staff who cooks, serves, and converses with guests; street‑side tables, welcoming and relaxed atmosphere
source_files: Greece and Turkey/All Inclusive Guide - Greece and Turkey_Shital.pdf

restaurants.name: Old Balat Cafe and Kitchen
restaurants.ambience: Cozy, rustic atmosphere with exposed brick, vintage furniture, and a welcoming vibe that feels like a local kitchen
must_try_dishes: Slow-cooked lamb shank in rich tomato sauce
source_files: Greece and Turkey/All Inclusive Guide - Greece and Turkey_Shital.pdf

restaurants.name: Balat Antik Cafe
restaurants.ambience: Extremely photogenic and vibrant, with umbrella canopies over outdoor seating—perfect for Insta-worthy shots
source_files: Greece and Turkey/All Inclusive Guide - Greece and Turkey_Shital.pdf

restaurants.name: Forno
restaurants.ambience: Cozy café with exposed brick walls, bright tiles, and a stone-oven at its heart
source_files: Greece and Turkey/All Inclusive Guide - Greece and Turkey_Shital.pdf

restaurants.name: Hafiz Mustafa
restaurants.ambience: Classic Ottoman‑style patisserie with elegant display counters
source_files: Greece and Turkey/All Inclusive Guide - Greece and Turkey_Shital.pdf

restaurants.name: Vihana Kahvesi
restaurants.ambience: Stylish café blending Viennese and Turkish coffee culture; light, modern-chic interior and outdoor seating with views of Galata Tower
highlights: Blends Viennese and Turkish coffee culture
source_files: Greece and Turkey/All Inclusive Guide - Greece and Turkey_Shital.pdf

source_files: Greece and Turkey/All Inclusive Guide - Greece and Turkey_Shital.pdf

attractions.name: Topkapi Palace
attractions.hours: Wednesday to Monday, 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM. Closed on Tuesdays. Last entry is one hour before closing time
source_files: Greece and Turkey/All Inclusive Guide - Greece and Turkey_Shital.pdf

attractions.name: Balat
attractions.description: Offbeat, local neighborhood with colorful buildings, great photo spots and Turkish coffee cafés
source_files: Greece and Turkey/All Inclusive Guide - Greece and Turkey_Shital.pdf

attractions.name: Taksim Square & Istiklal Street
source_files: Greece and Turkey/All Inclusive Guide - Greece and Turkey_Shital.pdf

safety_tips.tip: Check local news or apps (like Google Alerts or Smart Traveler) for protests or strikes
Taxis without Meters - Always insist on using the meter. In Istanbul, use BiTaksi app (like Uber)
